theme: prune the hydra before it clones its heads
title: Prune the Hydra Before It Clones Its Heads
strategies: eager / call-by-value: fully reduce both sides before combining (trivial; = checker's own baseline)
leftmost-outermost / normal order: the provably-safe textbook strategy, fires S the instant it is recognized, duplicating unresolved arguments (greedy)
hybrid: fire K/I immediately at the head, but pre-normalize an S-redex's z argument (via the same strategy) before firing S, so duplication always copies the smallest possible form (strong)
true cost-optimal reduction order / Levy-style optimal sharing (open ceiling, uncovered)
